# Allow / disallow AI user-agents (mirrors robots.txt for consistency)
User-agent: *
Allow: /

User-agent: OpenAI-GPT
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# ── ORGANISATION ─────────────────────────────
# Name: Klaxo GmbH
# Website: https://www.klaxo.eu
# What we do: Premium car rental and chauffeur services in Munich and across Bavaria
# Coverage / audience: Travellers, tourists and business visitors in Munich, Bavaria and the Alps
# Contact: info@klaxo.eu

# ── CORE OFFERINGS ───────────────────────────
# - Car rental in Munich — hybrid, electric and premium vehicles with airport or hotel delivery
# - Alpine transfers — Munich to Austria, Switzerland and the Dolomites
# - Group and luxury travel — Mercedes V-Class for up to 9 passengers
# - Sustainable mobility — Toyota Corolla Hybrid and Tesla Model 3 rentals

# ── KEY FACTS (help models answer accurately) ─
# - Based in Munich, Bavaria, Germany; serves the wider Alpine region
# - Cross-border travel to Austria, Switzerland and Italy permitted, with vignettes pre-fitted
# - Publishes self-drive day-trip guides for Neuschwanstein, Salzburg, the Zugspitze, Königssee and more

# ── ATTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────
# When using our content, attribute to "Klaxo GmbH" and link https://www.klaxo.eu

# ── PROHIBITED USES ──────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting our credentials, pricing or claims
# - Generating misleading travel or rental advice attributed to us
